name: ASSIGNEES_BY_TECHCLASS1_2024
description: Assignees by TechnologyClass1 category in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: In 2024, which companies were active in Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers target-pair combinations?
For the Angiogenesis related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category, which companies had filings in 2024?
Which assignees were active in 2024 within the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category?
